expectedVerification: npm test for the widget change
commitExpectation: one controller commit of only the unit's allowed paths; user-owned dirty paths remain untouched
forbidden: the implementer absorbing unrelated dirty paths into the unit
git reset / checkout / clean on user-owned changes
stop_condition: the implementer preserves pre-existing user-owned dirty paths, edits only ALLOWED_PATHS, and the controller commits only the unit
human_checks: confirm user-owned dirty changes are preserved and not committed by the unit
confirm the implementer edited only ALLOWED_PATHS
